metadata.role_title: AI Engineer / Senior AI Engineer (NeoGPT, RAG)

metadata.cold_outreach_angle: 'Built a RAG system at 95% MRR / 50K+ q/mo — your ComplianceOS (circular ingestion + 70-agent fan-out) is exactly the kind of retrieval-bottleneck I love. Would love 20 min with Anuj.'
